conferences.fullName: AMIA Annual Symposium
conferences.notes: AMIA 2027 Annual Symposium is in San Diego, CA. The Call for Participation is not yet open; paper/podium/panel deadlines are typically ~mid-to-late March (deadlines use Eastern Time; extensions common).

conferences.fullName: AMIA Amplify Informatics Conference
conferences.notes: AMIA Amplify Informatics 2027 is in Atlanta, GA. The 2027 call is not yet open; the submission deadline is typically ~November (deadlines use Eastern Time; extensions common).

conferences.fullName: World Congress on Medical and Health Informatics
conferences.notes: Biennial (odd years). MedInfo 2027 is in Dubai. The Call for Submissions is not yet open; the deadline is typically ~December–January (historically stated in Eastern Time).

conferences.fullName: Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing
conferences.notes: Paper deadline Aug 3, 2026 (11:59pm PT). A separate abstract/poster deadline is Dec 1, 2026 (no extensions). Acceptance Sep 8; camera-ready Oct 1, 2026.

conferences.fullName: Association for Health Learning and Inference - Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning
conferences.notes: CHIL 2027 is not yet announced (host city rotates among US cities; event typically late June). The paper deadline is typically ~early February (deadlines use Eastern Time).

conferences.fullName: Intelligent Systems for Molecular Biology
conferences.notes: 2027 is a joint ISMB/ECCB meeting in Copenhagen. The Call for Papers is not yet open; the proceedings (paper) deadline is typically ~mid-to-late January. The next standalone ISMB is 2028 (Calgary).

conferences.fullName: European Conference on Computational Biology
conferences.notes: In 2027, ECCB is held jointly as ISMB/ECCB 2027 in Copenhagen — the same event as the ISMB entry. The proceedings deadline is typically ~mid-to-late January (not yet open). A standalone European ECCB returns in even years (next ~2028).

conferences.fullName: Research in Computational Molecular Biology
conferences.notes: RECOMB 2027 is in Toronto (announced on the RECOMB 2026 site); exact dates are not yet posted (typically spring). Submission is two-stage: abstract (~early Nov 2026) then full paper (~mid-to-late Nov 2026, 23:59 AoE).

conferences.fullName: IEEE International Conference on Bioinformatics and Biomedicine
conferences.notes: Full-paper deadline July 5, 2026 — IEEE BIBM frequently extends this, so verify closer to the date. Notification Sep 25; camera-ready Oct 25, 2026.

conferences.fullName: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
conferences.notes: NeurIPS 2027 will be in Europe (city and dates not yet announced). Abstract and full-paper deadlines are typically ~mid-May (23:59 AoE); the event is typically early-to-mid December.

conferences.fullName: International Conference on Machine Learning
conferences.notes: ICML 2027's location will be announced ~August 2026 (dates not yet set). Abstract and full-paper deadlines are typically ~late January (23:59 AoE); the event is typically mid-July.

conferences.fullName: International Conference on Learning Representations
conferences.notes: ICLR 2027 will be on the North American West Coast (city and dates not yet announced). Abstract and full-paper deadlines are typically ~late September (23:59 AoE) — likely posted soon; the event is typically late April.

conferences.fullName: AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
conferences.notes: Two-phase deadline for AAAI-27: abstract/title July 21, 2026 and full paper July 28, 2026 (both 11:59pm AoE).

conferences.fullName: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
conferences.notes: CVPR 2027 is in Seattle, WA (Jun 20–24, 2027). The paper registration/submission deadline is typically ~mid-November (23:59 AoE); not yet posted.

conferences.fullName: Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
conferences.notes: Uses the ACL Rolling Review (ARR) submission system. ACL 2027 is in the Asia-Pacific region (Japan reported, unconfirmed; dates not yet announced). Submission is via an ARR cycle whose deadline is typically a few months before the meeting (~February 2027).

conferences.fullName: Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
conferences.notes: Uses the ACL Rolling Review (ARR) submission system. EMNLP 2027 is not yet announced (location and dates TBA). The ARR submission deadline is typically ~May (23:59 AoE); EMNLP is historically held November–December.

conferences.fullName: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
conferences.notes: Two submission cycles. KDD 2027 Cycle 1: abstract July 19, full paper July 26, 2026 (23:59 AoE). The Cycle 2 paper deadline is typically ~February 2027 (not yet posted).

conferences.fullName: Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention
conferences.notes: MICCAI 2027 is in Auckland, New Zealand. Submission is two-stage: intent/abstract (~mid-to-late February) then full paper (~late February–early March 2027, 23:59 AoE); not yet posted.

conferences.fullName: Medical Imaging with Deep Learning
conferences.notes: MIDL 2027 will be in Europe (early July; city and dates not yet announced). Submission is two-stage: paper registration then full paper (~mid-December 2026–January 2027, 23:59 AoE); not yet posted.

conferences.fullName: Machine Learning for Healthcare
conferences.notes: MLHC 2027 is not yet announced (venue rotates; recent hosts in the US). The full-paper deadline is typically ~mid-April, with a pre-submission/intent step ~1 week earlier; the event is typically mid-August.

conferences.fullName: Association for Health Learning and Inference - Machine Learning for Health Symposium
conferences.notes: ML4H 2026 is co-located with NeurIPS 2026 in Sydney. The submission deadline is Sep 11, 2026 per the official OpenReview venue (submissions open Aug 1; exact time to be confirmed, historically 23:59 AoE).

conferences.fullName: Society for Epidemiologic Research Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. SER 2027 is in Detroit, MI; the abstract portal typically opens ~November and closes ~mid-January (2027 call not yet open).

conferences.fullName: American Public Health Association Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. APHA 2027 is in Philadelphia, PA; abstract submission typically closes ~late March/early April (2027 call not yet open).

conferences.fullName: American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. AACR 2027 is in Orlando, FL; the regular abstract deadline is typically ~mid-to-late November, with a separate late-breaking track ~mid-January (2027 call not yet open).

conferences.fullName: American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. ASCO 2027 is in Chicago; the regular abstract deadline is typically ~late January/early February, with a separate late-breaking track ~early-to-mid March (2027 call not yet open).

conferences.fullName: Breast Cancer Association Consortium Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. This is an invitation-based consortium meeting (with CIMBA/ENIGMA) — there is no public call for abstracts, only a registration deadline shortly before each meeting. The next edition is expected ~June 2027 in a rotating European city (not yet announced).

conferences.fullName: European Society for Medical Oncology Congress
conferences.notes: In epidemiology and public health, conference presentations are not considered peer-reviewed publications. So, only abstracts need to be submitted. ESMO Congress 2027 is in Barcelona (the congress shifts to September); the regular abstract deadline is typically ~early-to-mid May, with a separate late-breaking track ~August (2027 call not yet open).

conferences.fullName: American Society of Preventive Oncology Annual Meeting
conferences.notes: ASPO 2027 is in Atlanta, GA (Emory Conference Center); the abstract deadline is typically ~late October/early November (2027 call not yet open).
